task_completion.description: Log into the FreeScout help desk application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeScout dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login as admin.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the System Settings page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Settings' menu is open and the 'System' or 'App' settings page is displayed.

task_completion.description: Set the Company Name to the required value
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Company Name' or 'App Name' input field contains exactly 'Pacific Northwest Medical Center - IT Support'.
The 'Timezone' dropdown is set to 'America/Los_Angeles' or its UI equivalent (e.g., '(GMT-07:00) Pacific Time (US)').

task_completion.description: Set the Time Format to a 12-hour format
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Time Format' dropdown or radio button is set to a 12-hour format option (typically showing an example with 'AM' or 'PM').
A 'Save' button has been clicked, and a success message (e.g., 'Settings saved') is visible, or the settings persist on the screen after saving.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions are performed within a web browser interface, not via terminal commands (like curl or direct database SQL queries).

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine FreeScout application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct URL (http://localhost:8080) and the standard FreeScout UI is present, rather than a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to artificially modify the DOM text without actually changing the settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Company Name is exactly 'Pacific Northwest Medical Center - IT Support'. The Timezone must be set to 'America/Los_Angeles' (which may appear in the FreeScout UI as '(GMT-07:00) Pacific Time (US)' or similar). The Time Format must be set to a 12-hour format (which includes AM/PM indicators).
